stemHtml: In a steep turn, the northerly turning error on a direct reading magnetic compass on the northern hemisphere is:

options.a: none on a 090° heading in a right turn.
options.b: none on a 270° heading in a left turn.
options.c: equal to 180° on a 090° heading in a right turn.
options.d: equal to 180° on a 270° heading in a right turn.
